name: task-loop
description: Task-loop setup, preflight, and specify-aims proposal support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup, preflight, and proposal aims for task-loop in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Task Loop to configure the hosted Supabase task board, save local credentials, register a repository, verify setup, and author the initial task-loop proposal with specify-aims. Codex support is rolling out in phases; create-cycle and run-cycle remain pending.
defaultPrompt: Set up task-loop for this repo.
Specify aims for this task-loop project.
